# Copilot Instructions For AGENTIC-IAM

## Repository Intent

Treat this repository as a reusable starter/foundation package for Identity & Access within the Agentic ecosystem.

## Rules

- Preserve architecture agnosticism.
- Do not add stack-specific runtime code unless explicitly requested.
- Keep all documentation and generated content in English.
- Prefer minimal, deterministic, starter-compatible changes.
- Maintain consistency between the domain template, policy documents, and starter metadata.
- Treat the repository as a manual-adoption starter unless explicit platform-supported installation semantics are documented.
- Use the canonical terminology User, Tenant, TenantMembership, TenantRole, Permission, and AuditEvent.
- Do not introduce assumptions about backend frameworks, frontend frameworks, APIs, persistence models, or infrastructure.
- Keep the repository useful as a seed for future runtime-specific IAM starters.
- When proposing enhancements, favor documentation, governance, and starter-consumption clarity over implementation detail.
